methodology.strict_definition: exact_co match between SSDF item primary CO and referenced item primary CO, restricted to same-level pairs (process→process)
methodology.adjusted_definition: strict + same-slice match counted as convergent (slice-bridge)
methodology.hub_controls_treatment: NIST 800-53 SA-8 hub controls counted under cross_level.expected_divergence (not in strict/adjusted denominator)
methodology.cross_level_treatment: process→implementation pairs (SSDF→ASVS, SSDF→NIST-impl) reported separately under cross_level (not in strict/adjusted denominator)

comparison_to_v1_1_reference_2026_04_14.note: v1.1 reference run on 2026-04-14 reported 81% co_match / 100% co+slice on 69 comparisons. Methodology variant differs slightly (v1.1 used different pair-counting; v7 uses Variant B).
